changes: Restore the original MyCommands Network, System and Other command catalog
Display Scripts, Network, System, Other and Results as left-menu entries instead of top tabs

Restore Flush DNS, DNS lookup, TCP or UDP port test, netstat and port filtering actions
Validate variables server-side, keep command bodies server-side and poll real MeshAgent output
Add architecture tests preventing the restored command catalog from being removed or moved back to top tabs
Execute MyScripts PowerShell and CMD files instead of returning a synthetic completed result
Store real stdout, stderr, raw output and exit status in Approval Center results
Render JSON, meshTable, row arrays, CSV, TSV and semicolon-delimited output as filterable tables
Add inline Copy and collapsible Debug / raw output to script results
Send shared module POST requests through a parsed JSON payload envelope
Pass declared variable values, encrypted per-script secrets and assigned system integration profiles to executions
Shared UI architecture based on Approval Center
Unified module toolbars and settings
Approval request provider/status navigation
Direct Git installer and clean repository reset
Copy original MyScripts and MyCommands libraries to both seed and runtime paths
Detect active and disabled legacy plugin directories
Add Sync-Installed-Seeds.ps1 for manual synchronization
Removed lowercase mycompany.js because it overwrote MyCompany.js on Windows
Kept MyCompany and mycompany factories in the single MyCompany.js entrypoint
Added case-insensitive path collision validation
Moved plugin-main require inside a protected factory
Added a fallback administrative diagnostic panel
Added bootstrap stage logging
Added factory invocation validation to the installer
Restored MyCommands script folder navigation
Added folder graphics using the MyScripts icon convention
Fixed MyCommands tabs spacing and toolbar overflow
Made custom, multi-host and refresh actions visible
Added scripts root path to MyCommands settings
Retried legacy CommandTabs/MyCommands migration including disabled directories
Replaced the main entrypoint with a minimal deterministic bootstrap
Moved plugin implementation to plugin-main.js
Verified both MyCompany and mycompany exports before service startup
Added deployment preflight checks
Fixed admin Unauthorized caused by shortName case transition
Added admin-only MyCompany/mycompany alias without duplicate hooks
Preserved the active pin in admin asset URLs
Lowercase shortName compatibility
Module load isolation
Admin diagnostics
Migrated full My Commands workflows, multi-host execution, structured results and script metadata
Expanded Approval Center provider tabs, visibility, API tokens and idempotency
Expanded Move Requests history and settings

Made MyScripts the shared UI standard for all modules

Restored folder tree, folder icons, search, output pane, results and settings
Restored user selection, Jira Assets wizard and per-script secret dialogs
Added one-time copy of the legacy My Scripts library and local settings
Kept My Scripts as an internal MyCompany module with no external plugin loading
Migrated My Jira and Jira Assets into the consolidated runtime
Migrated Defender XDR incidents into the consolidated runtime
Added shared integration settings and encrypted secrets
Added one-time legacy configuration migration
Added shared HTTP client and lazy specialist integrations
